goal: Complete the remaining work from PLAN_GIT_MCP.md: strip git mounts/env from claude-server, remove baseline capture from its entrypoint, and update docs to reflect the new 7-container architecture.

tasks.name: Strip workspace/gitdir from claude-server
tasks.action: In docker-compose.yml claude-server: remove volumes ./workspace:/workspace:ro and ./workspace/.git:/gitdir; remove env vars GIT_DIR and GIT_WORK_TREE. In Dockerfile.claude: remove the `git` package install if present (git now lives only in git-server).
tasks.verify: docker compose config shows no /workspace or /gitdir mounts under claude-server; GIT_DIR and GIT_WORK_TREE absent from its environment block.
tasks.done: claude-server service in docker-compose.yml has no /workspace or /gitdir volumes and no GIT_DIR/GIT_WORK_TREE env vars; Dockerfile.claude does not install git.

tasks.name: Remove baseline capture from claude-server entrypoint
tasks.action: Delete the `if [ -n "$GIT_DIR" ] && [ -n "$GIT_WORK_TREE" ]` block (baseline commit capture). Baseline capture now happens in git-server's entrypoint. Keep the isolation check and exec lines.
tasks.verify: entrypoint.sh contains no reference to GIT_DIR, GIT_WORK_TREE, or GIT_BASELINE_COMMIT.
tasks.done: entrypoint.sh has the baseline capture block removed.

tasks.name: Update docs/CONTEXT.md for new architecture
tasks.action: Update CONTEXT.md to reflect the 7-container architecture: (1) architecture diagram: change git_mcp.py line to show HTTPS REST → git-server:8443; add git-server to the indented service tree. (2) Service inventory table: rename to 'Seven containers', add git-server row. (3) MCP tools table: change git row transport from 'stdio → git subprocess' to 'stdio → HTTPS REST'; change access from 'Read/write /gitdir...' to 'via git-server:8443'. (4) Request flow step 6: change from 'git subprocess' to 'HTTPS REST → git-server:8443'. (5) Volume mounts on claude-server: remove /workspace and /gitdir rows; keep only /docs row. Add new 'Volume mounts on git-server' table with /gitdir (rw) and /workspace:ro rows. (6) Security principles: update item 14 to say 'seven containers'. (7) Token isolation matrix: add GIT_API_TOKEN row with claude-server ✓ required, git-server ✓ required, others ✗ forbidden.
tasks.verify: CONTEXT.md mentions git-server, shows 7 containers, has no 'git subprocess' references in the architecture section.
tasks.done: docs/CONTEXT.md accurately describes the 7-container architecture with git-server.
